_invariant: adversarial: rebasing token WITH a 20M unauthorized single mint (12.57% of supply) ON TOP of the MEASURED organic rebase -> the rebasing flag must NOT blind the single-tx mint check. total_supply = MEASURED organic 07-16 supply (139.08M, blk 10467200) + the SYNTHETIC 20M mint = 159.08M. The 20M mint to 0xattacker is a synthetic adversarial construct (no such mint historically occurred on AMPL); the organic supply it rides on is measured.

_measured.organic_total_supply: ethereum totalSupply @ block 10467200 (2020-07-16T00:00Z): 139076241299642019 (9dp) = 139,076,241.30 AMPL (the real organic rebase, NO synthetic mint)
_measured.total_supply_construction: measured organic 139,076,241.30M + synthetic 20.0M mint = 159,076,241.30M (159076241299642019). The +20M is the adversarial injection, NOT on-chain.
_measured.mint_pct: synthetic 20.0M / 159.08M total = 12.57% of supply — a large double-digit single-tx unauthorized mint; HIGH floor unchanged (label modelled 16.7%).
_measured.supply_samples: ethereum totalSupply @ 00:00 UTC on 2020-07-14 (blk 10454328), 07-15 (blk 10460734), then the constructed unauth total (measured organic 07-16 + 20M synthetic)
_measured.organic_window_no_mint: Transfer logs over [10460734..10467200] (rebase->unauth day, 6466 blocks, 4927 Transfers): 0 mints (from 0x0), 0 burns (to 0x0) — so the 20M mint_event is the SOLE mint in this case, a clean synthetic injection with no real-mint contamination.
_measured.asserted: the mint_event (amount 20M, to 0xattacker, tx 0xevil), authorized_minters [0xampl_policy], and rebasing:true are SYNTHETIC/host-fed (placeholder identifiers — no such mint occurred historically)
